mapper.insert: INSERT INTO match_waiting_queue ( product_id, user_id, status, requested_at, matched_at, canceled_at, target_party_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{requestedAt}, #{matchedAt}, #{canceledAt}, #{targetPartyId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, product_id, user_id, status, requested_at, matched_at, canceled_at, target_party_id, created_at, updated_at FROM match_waiting_queue WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'WAITING' LIMIT 1

SELECT id, product_id, user_id, status, requested_at, matched_at, canceled_at, target_party_id, created_at, updated_at FROM match_waiting_queue WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = 'WAITING' ORDER BY requested_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, product_id, user_id, status, requested_at, matched_at, canceled_at, target_party_id, created_at, updated_at FROM match_waiting_queue WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = 'WAITING' ORDER BY requested_at ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, product_id, user_id, status, requested_at, matched_at, canceled_at, target_party_id, created_at, updated_at FROM match_waiting_queue WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, product_id, user_id, status, requested_at, matched_at, canceled_at, target_party_id, created_at, updated_at FROM match_waiting_queue WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE match_waiting_queue SET status = 'MATCHED', matched_at = NOW(), target_party_id = #{targetPartyId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'WAITING'
UPDATE match_waiting_queue SET status = 'CANCELED', canceled_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'WAITING'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM match_waiting_queue WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = 'WAITING'
